title: Sophisticated Tags
description: A helper mod that adds per-tier item/block tags for Sophisticated Storage chests. Useful for datapacks, scripting (KubeJS), and other mods.
body:
**Sophisticated Tags**  
A small helper mod that provides **per-tier item/block tags** for [Sophisticated Storage](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sophisticated-storage?utm_source=chatgpt.com).

### **Features**

*   Adds new tags for every storage tier:
    *   Wooden/Basic Chest
    *   Copper Chest
    *   Iron Chest
    *   Gold Chest
    *   Diamond Chest
    *   Netherite Chest
*   Provides **item tags**.
*   Fully data-driven, no recipes changed.
*   Designed for **datapacks, scripting (KubeJS), and other mods** to easily reference storage tiers.
*   Runs as a **data-only mod (lowcodefml)** – lightweight and safe.

**Compatibility**

*   Minecraft **1.21.1**
*   Loader: **NeoForge**
*   Requires: [Sophisticated Storage](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sophisticated-storage?utm_source=chatgpt.com)
